title: Refusal in a turn emits avp.refusal_recorded and terminates the run with StopReason.refused
description: When the driver detects a refusal-flavored signal (Anthropic stop_reason=refusal, OpenAI content_filter, Gemini SAFETY/BLOCKLIST/etc.), the runner MUST emit one avp.refusal_recorded event carrying avp.refusal.reason (provider's verbatim code), optional avp.refusal.message, optional avp.refusal.category, and optional avp.refusal.provider — then terminate with avp.agent_stopped where avp.reason='refused'. The refused turn MUST NOT be appended to history (so a higher-level supervisor can choose to reset and retry without re-feeding the refusal). This is the wire signal a supervisor relies on to count refusals and distinguish them from converged or budget-exhausted runs.
